sharingCriteriaRules.description: Create new Sharing rule on Lead object to share the Leads with Lead Source = Web to Sales Rep North role users with Read/Write Access.
sharingCriteriaRules.label: Lead access to sales rep north

sharingOwnerRules.description: new Sharing rule on Lead object to share the Leads owned by Sales Manager to Sale Rep South role users with Read-only access.
sharingOwnerRules.label: Lead access to sales rep south
